svg.aria-label: repowise: one index producing code health, a dependency graph, git history, generated docs, architectural decisions, and ten MCP tools
svg.text: One index. Everything your agent and your team keep asking for.
Index once, in seconds, no LLM required. Every answer below is already computed.

your agent edits a file the decision governs.

−70% tool calls · −89% file reads · fewer round-trips per answer
